items.description: This is a tool for analyzing Snowball portfolio data. It can retrieve portfolio historical data and perform various indicator analyses, supporting automatic analysis of annual and monthly rankings as well as summary report generation.

items.name: Bellabeat_Case_Study_with_Python
items.description: Analysis of Fitbit smart device data to uncover consumer behavior patterns and guide Bellabeat's marketing strategy. Using Python and Excel, the project explores activity levels, sleep, steps, and calorie trends across 33 users, delivering actionable recommendations for the Bellabeat app.
